title: kaori.feedback.actions
description: F-036 Decision Override + future feedback signals — fired by ai-orchestrator when a domain expert overrides an AI decision (today) or marks one as actioned (future, when Sprint 7 PR D is migrated to emit too). Consumers (planned): F-074 fine-tuning trigger, F-060 ROI rollup, audit / compliance exporter. Producer: services/ai-orchestrator/routers/decisions.py.

override_id.description: decision_overrides.override_id — UUID string. Unique per emit; a revoke event references the same override_id with action='override.revoke'.

decision_id.description: decision_audit_log.decision_id — joins back to the original AI decision row.

enterprise_id.description: Tenant scope. Consumers must filter their downstream outputs by this.

action.description: What kind of feedback fired. Additive — F-060 added customer.actioned / customer.unactioned for the per-customer is_actioned toggle on gold_features (the canonical North Star column). Future actions extend this enum further.

decision_type.description: Optional — convenience copy of decision_audit_log.decision_type so consumers can route without joining (e.g., 'churn_risk' → fine-tuning, 'pricing' → manual review).

original_value.description: Snapshot of the AI's chosen_value at override time. Empty string when not applicable (e.g. action='override.revoked' carries the override_value being revoked, not the original).

override_value.description: The human-supplied corrected value (action='override.created') or the revoked override's value (action='override.revoked').

reason.description: User-supplied justification — for create this is decision_overrides.reason; for revoke it's decision_overrides.revoke_reason. May be empty on revoke if user didn't supply one.

user_id.description: decision_overrides.overridden_by_user (or revoked_by_user). UUID string. Consumers needing PII redaction should treat this as an opaque identifier — don't dereference into enterprise_users on emit.

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the override was created or revoked.
